title: ArcCraft Material Property Table
description: Schema for ArcCraft material property table JSON files.

$schema.description: Relative path to the JSON schema file.

maxActiveRules.description: Maximum rules that can fire per craft. 0 = unlimited.

extraTimeWeightBonusCap.description: Maximum weight bonus from extra craft time.

baseBandBudget.description: Base budget for band selection. 0 = no budget.

budgetPerQuality.description: Additional budget per unit of quality above 1.0.

materialPropertyRule.description: A rule mapping tag patterns to quality bands.

tagQuery.description: Tag query that must match ingredient tags.

requiredRecipeTags.description: Recipe must have ALL of these tags for rule to fire.

priority.description: Higher priority rules are evaluated first.

outputTags.description: Tags added to output when this rule fires.

qualityBandPreset.description: Soft object path to shared QualityBandPreset asset.

qualityBands.description: Inline quality bands (ignored if preset is set).
